title: Decorative covers
body:
![decorative covers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5571e9534f8f4afe814ce72f02fbb914afca2f7.png)

This mod adds wooden covers designed specifically for decorating buildings in Minecraft, such as pergolas and other architectural elements. 
With a variety of styles and finishes, wood decking provides a natural and elegant aesthetic to your construction projects, allowing you to create welcoming and visually appealing outdoor spaces. 
Improve your builds with this mod and add a touch of sophistication to your Minecraft worlds.

The 3D design of all covers is improved

![covers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5962f7f8430b459768a6832e865b47385820bcd1.png)

4 of the covers 4,5,6 and 8 have a cover connector to join with the pole

![connector](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56d5b8eeb8d86d5ebaedcb68e2007505f31e53f6.png)

A new cover with a connector was added

![new cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f615af3b13d6fd97052c6a852551d9176a0f6ac2.png)

new coverages added

![add covers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bee15b5c86227cdd6ec3038ef10af78633a1541d_0.webp)

Crafting

![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edca5084a96389eeb64bf66759a292b2be7c9b7d.png)
